title: Golden Square
description: 65,000 sqft commercial development with a sleek black and grey façade. Expansive glass surfaces paired with warm wooden accents and green terraces enhance the environment.
challenge: Integrating a high-density commercial program within a restricted urban footprint while maintaining a sense of openness and connectivity.
solution: We utilized a staggered terrace system and vertical green walls to create 'pockets of air' within the structure, coupled with high-performance glass to maximize natural light.

title: Mall Extension
description: 73,000 sqft mall extension blending modern and cultural design. Façade features off-white panels, bronze accents, and traditional jali screens with a grand double-height entry porch.
challenge: Extending an existing structure while respecting the historical context of Amritsar without creating a jarring architectural disconnect.
solution: Modernizing traditional Jali patterns into laser-cut bronze screens that provide shade and cultural continuity, while using off-white panels to provide a clean, contemporary backdrop.

title: Lal Sweets
description: Modern industrial-commercial facility with a strong architectural identity. Vertical fins and bold frames define the exterior structure, designed for efficiency and functional excellence.
challenge: Transforming a purely functional industrial space into a brand-defining architectural statement.
solution: The use of bold vertical fins creates a dynamic play of light and shadow throughout the day, effectively 'branding' the building through its unique form.

title: Village Wave Group
description: Large-scale plotted development with strategic master planning. Focus on optimized land use and organized infrastructure to create balanced and sustainable urban environments.
challenge: Balancing high-density residential requirements with significant green cover and community spaces.
solution: A central 'Green Spine' was designed to connect all residential clusters, ensuring every plot is within a 2-minute walk of a park.
